tools.name: list_funds
tools.description: List funds and as-of dates available in this portfolio source.

tools.name: get_positions
tools.description: Return the GP-reported valuations (marks) per portfolio company to be reviewed.

tools.name: get_fund_nav_build
tools.description: Return the fund-level NAV build (portfolio FV + cash + other − liabilities).

tools.name: get_capital_flows
tools.description: Return contributions / distributions / ending-NAV history (for IRR & MOIC).

tools.name: get_fund_terms
tools.description: Return fund economics & waterfall terms (commitments, hurdle, catch-up, carry).

tools.name: get_valuation_policy
tools.description: Return the valuation policy rules used to review the GP marks (P1–P4).
